peopleAlsoAsk.question: Why would anyone use UDP over TCP?
peopleAlsoAsk.title: TCP vs UDP: Differences Between TCP & UDP Protocols - Avast
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: It depends on what you're doing online and the type of data being transferred. UDP is better if you're gaming online, because its speedy data transfer allows for mostly lag-free gaming. TCP is better if you're transferring files, like family photos, because it ensures the data arrives exactly as it was sent.Feb 23, 2023

peopleAlsoAsk.question: Is Netflix TCP or UDP?
peopleAlsoAsk.title: Why does Netflix use TCP but not UDP for streaming video?
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: Netflix uses TCP because TCP is much time-sensitive and does not require port forwarding. It helps to enable the full bandwidth of the network. We can compress more data at once in TCP and also reloaded data packets do not pose a problem. It also ensures higher video quality and fewer network congestion problems.Jul 23, 2025

peopleAlsoAsk.question: Does port 443 use TCP or UDP?
peopleAlsoAsk.title: What is Port 443? How HTTPS secures web traffic | Sectigo® Official
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: At this point, the web browser initiates a secure connection via port 443, sending a Transmission Control Protocol (TCP) request. Next, the SSL/TLS certificate is sent to the client.Apr 10, 2025

peopleAlsoAsk.question: What is TCP, UDP, and HTTP?
peopleAlsoAsk.title: A Beginner's Guide to Networking Protocols: TCP, UDP, HTTP, and ...
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: TCP ensure data arrives intact and in order. UDP prioritizes speed over reliability. HTTP leverages TCP to ensure web pages are delivered reliably. HTTP/3 leverages QUIC to ensure fast connection and reliability.Jun 5, 2024
